query:
SELECT usr.id, usr.userId, usr.roleId, sr.name as roleName, u.name as userName, u.email, u.isActive
FROM userSystemRoles usr
JOIN systemRoles sr ON usr.roleId = sr.id
JOIN users u ON usr.userId = u.id
WHERE sr.code = 'super_admin'
ORDER BY usr.id
